RET 0x4

PUSH EAX
PUSH <ADDR> ; g_pCompCodeTable destination
PUSH ECX
MOV dword ptr [ESP + 0x14],<ADDR> ; field desc array addr
MOV dword ptr [ESP + 0x18],0x1
MOV dword ptr [ESP + 0x1c],0x1f ; 0x1F = SPECIAL_FLAGS (0x10|0x08|0x04|0x02|0x01)
MOV dword ptr [ESP + 0x28],<ADDR> ; table name "armtype"
MOV dword ptr [ESP + 0x2c],0x9 ; type=9 TOKEN field
MOV dword ptr [ESP + 0x34],0x20 ; 0x20 = token field offset
MOV dword ptr [ESP + 0x3c],<ADDR> ; pArchive pointer
CALL <ADDR>
MOV [<ADDR>],EAX
ADD ESP,0x3c ; 0x3C = sizeof(BinFieldDesc)
RET

SUB ESP,0x3c ; 0x3C=60: stack frame size for BinFieldDesc[3]
XOR EAX,EAX
PUSH 0x34 ; 0x34=52: field desc array size (BinFieldDesc[3])
PUSH EAX
MOV dword ptr [ESP + 0x14],EAX
MOV dword ptr [ESP + 0x18],EAX
MOV dword ptr [ESP + 0x24],EAX
MOV dword ptr [ESP + 0x2c],EAX
MOV dword ptr [ESP + 0x34],EAX
MOV dword ptr [ESP + 0x38],EAX
MOV dword ptr [ESP + 0x3c],EAX
MOV dword ptr [ESP + 0x40],EAX
LEA EAX,[ESP + 0x8]
PUSH EAX
PUSH <ADDR> ; s_szName: "armtype" string pointer (BinFieldDesc[0].szName)
PUSH ECX
MOV dword ptr [ESP + 0x14],<ADDR> ; BinFieldDesc[0].dwFlags=0 (composit field has no flags)
MOV dword ptr [ESP + 0x18],0x1
MOV dword ptr [ESP + 0x1c],0x1f ; BinFieldDesc[0].dwType=0x1f=31 (armor type field)
